name: Evolution Stables Design Tokens
description: Design tokens exported from DESIGN.md for developer handoff

brand-gold.name: Brand Gold
brand-gold.description: The ONLY accent color - for CTAs, key metrics, interactive elements

heritage.name: Instrument Serif
heritage.usage: H1, H2, hero statements - never for UI/body

precision.name: Inter Tight
precision.usage: Body text, labels, UI elements, navigation

data.name: Geist Mono
data.usage: Code, data tables, odds, timestamps, metrics

colorRules: Background: Always use #09090b (Velvet Night) for primary surfaces
Surface: Use #0a0a0a for elevated components (cards, modals, dropdowns)
Foreground: Use #f5f5f5 for primary text on dark backgrounds
Muted: Use #a1a1aa for secondary text, captions, and de-emphasized content
Gold Accent: Use #d4a964 EXCLUSIVELY for CTAs, key metrics, interactive elements, and brand monograms
Never use gold accent for body text or large color blocks
typographyRules: Instrument Serif: Reserved for headings, hero statements, and brand expressions ONLY
Inter Tight: Used for ALL body text, UI elements, navigation, and labels
Geist Mono: Used exclusively for data presentation (odds, timestamps, metrics, code)
Never mix more than 2 font families in any single composition
Maintain consistent line heights: 1.4 for body, 1.2 for headings

accessibility.minimumStandards: WCAG AA for normal text (4.5:1), WCAG AAA for large text (3:1)
